misc: Rarely uses his driver, which has raised questions about his masculinity.
biography: Ossi, a competitor known for his strategic play and calm demeanor, is a familiar face at the Hector Trophée, representing the Kullo Golf Club.

While Ossi has yet to capture the coveted Hector Trophée or the Victor Trophy, his consistent presence in the tournament demonstrates his commitment to the sport and his dedication to honing his skills.

A point of intrigue amongst spectators is Ossi's infrequent use of his driver, a decision that has, perhaps unfairly, led to some questioning his confidence on the course. Ossi will make his fourth appearance in Hector Trophée 2026.
